# localized complete model context

`localized` is a focused immutable domain-value library. Read README.md and
every file indexed by docs/README.md. Normative behavior is in
docs/semantics.md; exported APIs are inventoried in docs/api.md; security and
resource bounds are in docs/security.md; migration semantics are in
docs/migration.md.

Never infer fallback from exact lookup, confuse empty with missing, mutate
caller data, log localized content, create a global locale, or expand the
package into a catalog, formatter, language detector, or translation client.
